prompt: Generate a screenshot of an online supermarket homepage that integrates the product card layout from the first image with the color scheme and logo positioning from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of an online supermarket homepage. The page should feature the dark color scheme of image 2, specifically a black or dark grey background with orange accents and white text. Position the supermarket logo in the top-left corner of the page header, consistent with its placement in image 2. The main content area must display product cards in a grid layout, utilizing the distinct design characteristics found in image 1. Each product card should have rounded corners, include a product image, title, price, star rating, color and size selection options, and a 'BUY +' button. Additionally, a discount badge should be prominently located in the top-left corner of each product card, mirroring the style seen in image 1.
objects: Dark color scheme (black/dark grey background, orange accents, white text)
Supermarket logo in top-left corner of page header
Product cards in a grid layout
Product image on each product card
Product title, price, and star rating on each product card
Color and size selection options on each product card
Discount badge in top-left corner of each product card
